questionTextSource: You are planning a longer journey with a purely electric vehicle. What should you be aware of?
explanationSource: If you are planning a longer journey with a purely electric vehicle, you should consider that your car has a much lower range compared to conventional vehicles. In addition, the capacity of the batteries is influenced by the outside temperature.
answerASource: The availability of electric charging stations
answerBSource: The battery charging time
answerCSource: The influence of external ambient temperatures on the range
questionTextTarget: Ani fren sırasında elektronik stabilite programı (ESP) size nasıl yardımcı olur?
explanationTarget: ESP aracın savrulmasını azaltabilir ve yön dengesini korumaya yardımcı olabilir. Fizik sınırlarını ortadan kaldırmaz.

questionTextSource: What should you be aware of when charging purely electric vehicles?
explanationSource: When charging pure electric vehicles, you must be aware that they cannot be recharged at every gas station. Only use the charging cables approved by the manufacturer. Depending on the power connection, the charging time varies.
answerASource: The charge time depends on the power supply
answerBSource: Charging should only be performed with a charging cable approved by the manufacturer
answerCSource: Charging is available at every filling station
questionTextTarget: Adaptif hız sabitleyici (ACC) hangi durumda size yardımcı olabilir?
explanationTarget: ACC öndeki araca olan mesafeyi ve seçilen hızı korumaya yardımcı olur. Sürücünün sorumluluğunu ortadan kaldırmaz.

questionTextSource: How is a purely electric vehicle different from a vehicle with a combustion engine?
explanationSource: Pure electric vehicles are almost noiseless. These vehicles also have no direct exhaust emissions. The aerodynamic drag depends on the volume of the body and not on the type of drive.
answerASource: - have a lower engine noise
answerBSource: - do not have any direct exhaust emissions
answerCSource: - have a lower aerodynamic drag
questionTextTarget: Acil fren asistanı hangi durumda yardımcı olabilir?
explanationTarget: Acil fren asistanı kritik durumlarda frenlemeyi destekleyebilir veya otomatik acil frenleme başlatabilir. Dikkatsiz sürüşü telafi etmez.

questionTextSource: You are driving a purely electric vehicle in a residential area. What should you be aware of due to your lower engine noise?
explanationSource: With a pure electric vehicle, you are almost noiseless on the road and you can acoustically be hardly perceived by other road users. Especially cyclists are at risk if they hear no engine noise. Without looking back, they often turn.
answerASource: Pedestrians will not notice me or will do so later than usual
answerBSource: Cyclist travelling ahead will turn left, without looking behind them
answerCSource: Vehicles following behind will tailgate me
questionTextTarget: Sürücü destek sistemleri hakkında neyi bilmelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Sistemin sınırlarını bilmeli ve her zaman trafiği kendiniz izlemelisiniz. Sistemler sorumluluğu tamamen devralmaz.
answerCTarget: Sistemin tüm görevleri her zaman tamamen devraldığını varsayabilirim

questionTextSource: You are driving a motor vehicle fitted with anti-lock braking system (ABS). How do you achieve the shortest possible braking distance?
explanationSource: If you drive a car with an automatic anti-lock braking system, you achieve the shortest braking distance by braking abruptly and with maximum pedal force. The ABS prevents the wheels from locking during braking.
answerASource: - suddenly and with maximum force
answerBSource: - carefully and then increasingly harder
answerCSource: - multiple times at quick intervals and with maximum force
questionTextTarget: Hangi durumlarda sürücü destek sistemlerinin işlevi sınırlanabilir?
explanationTarget: Kötü hava, kirli sensörler veya eksik yol işaretleri sistemlerin çalışmasını sınırlayabilir.

questionTextSource: A lane assist system with corrective steer control can help you when driving. What should you be aware of?
explanationSource: A prerequisite for a perfect function of the lane departure warning system are good road markings. Keep in mind that technical driving assistants cannot compensate for inability to drive. As a car driver, you must be able to intervene into the driving experience at all times.
answerASource: - keep the vehicle in lane if the road markings are clear
answerBSource: - not function if the road markings are poor
answerCSource: - compensate for a lack of fitness to drive (e.g. tiredness)
questionTextTarget: Otomatik acil frenleme sistemi ne yapabilir?
explanationTarget: Sistem çarpışma tehlikesini algılayabilir, sürücüyü uyarabilir ve gerekirse otomatik frenleme başlatabilir.

questionTextSource: You are driving at high speed into a bend. What could happen if you had to brake suddenly?
explanationSource: If you drive fast into a tight curve, you lose road grip when you brake hard and slide out of the curve. (Centrifugal force)
answerASource: - could lose its grip on the road
answerBSource: - could skid out of the bend
answerCSource: - will constantly maintain its driving stability with the stability control
questionTextTarget: Sürücü destek sistemleri kullanırken ne geçerlidir?
explanationTarget: Sürücü destek sistemleri sürücüyü destekler, fakat sürüş sorumluluğu sürücüde kalır. Sistemler her durumda kusursuz çalışmaz.

questionTextSource: What can result in your motor vehicle skidding while driving round a bend?
explanationSource: If you turn sharply, your vehicle may start to skid on bends. This can also happen if you drive too fast. Adjust your speed when cornering.
answerASource: Heavy oversteer
answerBSource: Driving too fast
answerCSource: Gently accelerating at the exit of the bend
questionTextTarget: Hangi durumlar acil fren asistanının işlevini kısıtlayabilir?
explanationTarget: Kirli sensörler, kötü hava koşulları ve sistemin algılayamadığı engeller acil fren asistanını sınırlayabilir.

questionTextSource: The lane keeping assist system warns you with acoustic, haptic or optical signals. What might be the cause of this?
explanationSource: If you drift out of your lane, the lane departure warning system detects this by recognising that you are approaching the lane marking. The permissible total mass must not be exceeded.
answerASource: My vehicle is getting close to the road markings at the side of the road
answerBSource: My vehicle is undercutting the safety distance to the vehicle ahead
answerCSource: Another vehicle is overtaking me with not enough side clearance
questionTextTarget: Adaptif hız sabitleyici kullanırken neyi unutmamalısınız?
explanationTarget: ACC sadece destek sağlar. Trafiği izlemeli, sistem sınırlarını bilmeli ve gerektiğinde kendiniz fren yapmalısınız.

questionTextSource: In what situation can the lane keep assist system with steering override help you?
explanationSource:
On motorways and country roads, steering intervention by the lane departure warning system can be helpful, as the markings are clearly visible there.
Due to poor markings and narrow lanes in roadworks, steering intervention by the lane departure warning system is not possible as it will most likely not be detected correctly.
answerASource: - on motorways
answerBSource: - on rural roads
answerCSource: - in constricted roadworks sites with poor road markings
questionTextTarget: Park asistanı hangi durumda yardımcı olabilir?
explanationTarget: Park asistanı uygun park yerlerini algılamaya ve park manevrasında destek vermeye yardımcı olabilir. Park iznini kontrol etmez.
answerCTarget: Park etmenin yasal olup olmadığını kesin belirlemede

questionTextSource: With which driving task can the lane keep assist system with steering override help the driver?
explanationSource:
If the lane markings are good, Lane Keeping Assist with steering intervention can help you to keep the vehicle on the lane when driving straight ahead.
When turning, you cross lanes and markings; the lane departure warning system cannot intervene to support you here. When overtaking, you signal to the lane departure warning system by flashing that you are crossing the lane markings intentionally. Thus, it does not intervene during the overtaking process.
answerASource: When driving in a straight line
answerBSource: When turning
answerCSource: When overtaking
questionTextTarget: Şerit değiştirme asistanı neye yardımcı olabilir?
explanationTarget: Şerit değiştirme asistanı kör noktadaki veya yan alandaki araçlar konusunda uyarabilir. Sürücünün kontrol yükümlülüğünü kaldırmaz.

questionTextSource: What can negatively affect the functioning of the lane keep assist system?
explanationSource:
If the lane markings are in a poor condition, the lane keeping assistant cannot recognise where the lane to be maintained is. Due to additional lane markings in construction areas, it is not obvious which is the lane to be kept to.
Weather conditions can affect the sensors of the lane departure warning system. In addition, water or snow can distort the markings.
answerASource: The weather conditions
answerBSource: The condition of the road markings
answerCSource: Additional road markings within a roadworks site
questionTextTarget: Şerit takip asistanı ne zaman yardımcı olabilir?
explanationTarget: Araç istemeden şeritten ayrılırsa sistem uyarı verebilir veya direksiyon müdahalesi yapabilir. Hız sınırını denetlemek ana görevi değildir.

questionTextSource: Under what conditions will the lane keep assist system with steering override function optimally?
explanationSource:
The lane keeping assistant works best with clear lane markings. 
Poor or additional markings in roadworks will not allow the lane departure warning system to intervene, as it will most likely not be detected correctly.
Weather conditions can affect the sensors of the lane departure warning system. In addition, snow can distort the markings.
answerASource: Where there are clear road markings
answerBSource: Where there are patches of snow on the road surface
answerCSource: Where there are additional roadworks markings
questionTextTarget: Dönüş asistanı hangi durumda uyarı verebilir?
explanationTarget: Dönüş asistanı dönüş sırasında yan taraftaki zayıf yol kullanıcıları veya engeller konusunda uyarabilir. Manevrayı tamamen devralmaz.
answerATarget: Yolcu tarafındaki zayıf yol kullanıcıları konusunda
answerCTarget: Tüm dönüş manevrasını tamamen yapmak için

questionTextSource: What driver assistance system offers a high degree of road safety potential?
explanationSource:
The Autonomous Emergency Brake Assist constantly detects the traffic in front of the vehicle. If a hazard is imminent, the Emergency Brake Assist can carry out an emergency braking manoeuvre. 
Braking too late or too timidly are often causes of traffic accidents. Brake assistants usually react faster than humans and thus offer more safety.
answerASource: The brake assist
answerBSource: The autonomous emergency brake
answerCSource: The cruise control system
questionTextTarget: Hangi sürücü destek sistemleri özellikle güvenlik potansiyeline sahiptir?
explanationTarget: Fren asistanı ve otomatik acil fren sistemi güvenlik potansiyeline sahiptir. Hız sabitleyici esas olarak konfor sistemidir.

questionTextSource: How can driver assistance systems help you?
explanationSource:
In critical traffic situations, driver assistance systems can react quickly and intervene automatically by steering or braking etc..
If danger is imminent, they can warn you with light, sound and haptic signals. Driver assistance systems can also help you with driving tasks, such as keeping in lane.
answerASource: - warn me of danger
answerBSource: - help me perform driving tasks
answerCSource: - intervene automatically in critical road traffic situations
questionTextTarget: Sürücü destek sistemleri size nasıl yardımcı olabilir?
explanationTarget: Sürücü destek sistemleri tehlikeler konusunda uyarabilir, sürüş görevlerinde yardımcı olabilir ve kritik trafik durumlarında otomatik müdahale edebilir.
answerBTarget: - sürüş görevlerini yerine getirmemde yardımcı olabilir
answerCTarget: - kritik trafik durumlarında otomatik müdahale edebilir

questionTextSource: What can result if you accelerate too hard when driving a front-wheel drive car through a road bend?
explanationSource: If you give a front-wheel drive car too much gas in a bend, it can swerve over the front axle. The front tyres lose their grip on the road and your vehicle can no longer be steered, but continues straight ahead and breaks away.
answerASource: - The front of the car can swerve
answerBSource: - Steerability can be reduced
answerCSource: - The rear of the car can swerve
questionTextTarget: Önden çekişli bir otomobille virajda çok sert hızlanırsanız ne olabilir?
explanationTarget: Ön taraf savrulabilir ve direksiyon hakimiyeti azalabilir. Arka tarafın savrulması önden çekişli araç için tipik sonuç değildir.

questionTextSource: Under what conditions can an active lane change assist system perform a lane change?
explanationSource: The Active Lane Change Assistant only performs a lane change when it cannot detect any vehicle in the relevant safety zone. For an active lane change, the assistant must first detect a marked lane with several lanes.
answerASource: - has detected an adequately marked carriageway with multiple lanes
answerBSource: - has not detected any vehicles in the relevant safety zone
answerCSource: - has detected a sufficiently large gap in the oncoming traffic
questionTextTarget: Aktif şerit değiştirme asistanı hangi koşullarda şerit değiştirebilir?
explanationTarget: Sistem yeterli şekilde işaretlenmiş çok şeritli yolu algılamalı ve ilgili güvenlik alanında araç algılamamış olmalıdır. Karşı trafikte boşluk, otoyol tipi şerit değişimi için belirleyici değildir.
answerATarget: - yeterli işaretli çok şeritli taşıt yolu algılamışsa
answerCTarget: - karşı trafikte yeterince büyük boşluk algılamışsa

questionTextSource: Your motor vehicle is equipped with an active lane keep assist system. What information can be indicated by the status display of this system?
explanationSource: The system must be able to display when it is switched on, switched off or has a malfunction, as this is important for the driver.
answerASource: - is activated
answerBSource: - is deactivated
answerCSource: - has a fault
questionTextTarget: Motorlu aracınız aktif şerit takip asistanıyla donatılmış. Bu sistemin durum göstergesi hangi bilgileri gösterebilir?
explanationTarget: Durum göstergesi sistemin etkin, devre dışı veya arızalı olduğunu gösterebilir.

questionTextSource: Your motor vehicle is equipped with a lane keep assist system. In what situation can this system help you?
explanationSource: Lane Keeping Assist helps you stay in lane. It warns you if you unintentionally leave the lane.
answerASource: - I depart from my lane unintentionally
answerBSource: - the maximum permissible speed is exceeded
answerCSource: - the vehicle is driving too quickly over ruts in the road
questionTextTarget: Motorlu aracınız şerit takip asistanıyla donatılmış. Bu sistem hangi durumda size yardımcı olabilir?
explanationTarget: Sistem istemeden şeritten ayrıldığınızda yardımcı olabilir. Hız sınırını aşma veya yoldaki oluklar ana işlevi değildir.
answerCTarget: - araç yoldaki oluklardan çok hızlı geçiyorsa

questionTextSource: You have the lane keep assist system activated in your motor vehicle. It emits a warning signal while you are driving. What could be the cause of this?
explanationSource: Lane Keeping Assist warns you if you unintentionally leave your lane. If you forget to indicate when changing lanes, Lane Keeping Assist recognizes this as unintentionally leaving your lane and warns you.
answerASource: I forgot to switch on my indicator when changing lane
answerBSource: I have unintentionally departed from my lane
answerCSource: I undercut the minimum distance between me and the vehicle ahead
questionTextTarget: Motorlu aracınızda şerit takip asistanı etkin. Sürüş sırasında uyarı sinyali veriyor. Bunun nedeni ne olabilir?
explanationTarget: Şerit değiştirirken sinyal vermemiş olabilirsiniz veya istemeden şeridinizden ayrılmış olabilirsiniz. Öndeki araca mesafenin altına düşmek bu sistemin tipik uyarısı değildir.
answerCTarget: Öndeki araçla aramdaki asgari mesafenin altına düştüm

questionTextSource: You are using your motor vehicle’s lane keep assist system while driving. The system does not respond when you depart from the lane. What could be the cause of this?
explanationSource: Due to missing lane markings, insufficient road illumination and heavy precipitation, the sensors of the lane departure warning system are impaired, which means that the lane is not reliably detected.
answerASource: Inadequate road illumination
answerBSource: Heavy precipitation
answerCSource: A lack of lane markings
questionTextTarget: Sürüş sırasında şerit takip asistanını kullanıyorsunuz. Şeritten ayrıldığınızda sistem tepki vermiyor. Bunun nedeni ne olabilir?
explanationTarget: Yetersiz yol aydınlatması, yoğun yağış veya şerit çizgilerinin olmaması sistemin tepki vermemesine neden olabilir.

questionTextSource: Your motor vehicle is equipped with a lane change assist system without steering intervention. While driving, the warning light flashes on the left-hand exterior rear-view mirror. What is this warning light indicating?
explanationSource: If there is a vehicle in the monitoring area, this is signaled by the warning lamp lighting up on the exterior mirror.
answerASource: Another vehicle is located within the monitored area
answerBSource: You may not now perform a lane change to the left
answerCSource: You can now perform a lane change to the left without any risk
questionTextTarget: Aracınız direksiyon müdahalesi olmayan şerit değiştirme asistanıyla donatılmış. Sürüş sırasında sol dış aynadaki uyarı lambası yanıp sönüyor. Bu neyi gösterir?
explanationTarget: İzlenen alanda başka bir araç vardır ve sola şerit değiştirmemelisiniz. Bu, risksiz şerit değiştirebileceğiniz anlamına gelmez.
answerATarget: İzlenen alanda başka bir araç bulunuyor
answerCTarget: Şimdi hiç risk olmadan sola şerit değiştirebilirsiniz

questionTextSource: While driving, you are using your motor vehicle’s active lane keep assist system. How can you manually override this driver assist system in the event that it intervenes?
explanationSource: Countersteering and activating the indicator overrides the intervention of Lane Keeping Assist.
answerASource: By counter-steering
answerBSource: By activating the indicator
answerCSource: By accelerating
questionTextTarget: Sürüş sırasında aktif şerit takip asistanını kullanıyorsunuz. Sistem müdahale ederse bunu manuel olarak nasıl geçersiz kılabilirsiniz?
explanationTarget: Karşı direksiyon yaparak veya sinyal vererek sistem müdahalesini geçersiz kılabilirsiniz. Hızlanmak uygun yöntem değildir.

questionTextSource: In which situation is it purposeful to use an active lane change assist system?
explanationSource: On motorways or motorway-like roads, the lane markings are clearly visible and the lanes are usually straight. This is where Active Lane Change Assist comes in handy.
answerASource: - motorways
answerBSource: - motorway-like roads
answerCSource: - roads without markings
questionTextTarget: Aktif şerit değiştirme asistanını hangi durumda kullanmak uygundur?
explanationTarget: Aktif şerit değiştirme asistanı otoyollarda ve otoyol benzeri yollarda anlamlıdır. İşaretsiz yollarda uygun değildir.

questionTextSource: You want to overtake and you have initiated a lane change using the active lane change assist system. What is correct?
explanationSource: The Active Lane Change Assistant can change lanes automatically after initiation. However, you must always monitor this, as e.g. safety distances are not always maintained automatically.
answerASource: The systems independently performs the lane change
answerBSource: I have to monitor the lane change
answerCSource: The system always maintains all safety distances independently
questionTextTarget: Sollamak istiyorsunuz ve aktif şerit değiştirme asistanıyla şerit değişimini başlattınız. Hangisi doğrudur?
explanationTarget: Sistem şerit değişimini bağımsız yapabilir, ancak siz manevrayı izlemek zorundasınız. Sistem her zaman tüm güvenlik mesafelerini bağımsız korumaz.
answerCTarget: Sistem her zaman tüm güvenlik mesafelerini bağımsız korur

questionTextSource: Which driver assistance systems do you have to manually activate to assist you in specific situations?
explanationSource: The active parking assistant and the adaptive cruise control system do not count as safety-relevant assistants. Therefore, you can activate them manually.
answerASource: The active park assist
answerBSource: The adaptive cruise control (ACC)
answerCSource: The emergency brake assist
questionTextTarget: Belirli durumlarda sizi desteklemesi için hangi sürücü destek sistemlerini manuel olarak etkinleştirmeniz gerekir?
explanationTarget: Aktif park asistanı ve adaptif hız sabitleyici genellikle manuel etkinleştirilir. Acil fren asistanı normalde arka planda hazırdır.

questionTextSource: You want to transport furniture in the van shown here (up to 3.5 t). Compared to driving a car, what do you have to be aware of?
explanationSource: A van is much higher, longer and wider than a normal car. Therefore, you should always pay attention to the signage of the passage height. You should also make sure that you adjust your speed in curves, as vans could overturn more easily. In addition, the side wind attacks an even larger area, which significantly increases the risk of being pressed out of the lane.
answerASource: - can roll over more easily when cornering
answerBSource: - requires special attention regarding vertical clearances
answerCSource: - is vulnerable to sidewinds
questionTextTarget: Gösterilen panelvanla (3,5 t’ye kadar) mobilya taşımak istiyorsunuz. Otomobil kullanmaya kıyasla neyi bilmelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Panelvan virajlarda daha kolay devrilebilir, yükseklik sınırlamalarına özel dikkat gerekir ve yan rüzgâra duyarlıdır.
answerBTarget: - yükseklik geçişleri konusunda özel dikkat gerektirir

questionTextSource: How does the active park assist help you when parking?
explanationSource: The active park assistant must be activated manually by you. After activating the assistant, the system supports you in finding a suitable parking space.
answerASource: - detects sufficiently large parking spaces
answerBSource: - detects all obstacles during the parking manoeuvre
answerCSource: - checks if parking is permissible at a particular place
questionTextTarget: Aktif park asistanı park ederken size nasıl yardımcı olur?
explanationTarget: Aktif park asistanı yeterince büyük park yerlerini algılayabilir. Tüm engelleri veya park etmenin yasallığını güvenilir şekilde belirlemez.
answerBTarget: - park manevrası sırasında tüm engelleri algılar
answerCTarget: - belirli bir yerde park etmenin izinli olup olmadığını kontrol eder

questionTextSource: Why might a turn assist system not always detect that a cyclist is present?
explanationSource: A turning assistant can work incorrectly due to various circumstances. So it is possible that a cyclist or a pedestrian is not recognized by the system if there are obstacles between you and the cyclist. For example, such can be parked vehicles or trees on the side of the road. Likewise, the pollution or damage to the sensor can easily be the reason for an incorrect function.
answerASource: There is dirt on the sensor
answerBSource: Parking cars conceal the cyclist
answerCSource: The sensor is damaged
questionTextTarget: Dönüş asistanı bir bisikletlinin varlığını neden her zaman algılamayabilir?
explanationTarget: Sensör kirliyse, park halindeki araçlar bisikletliyi gizliyorsa veya sensör hasarlıysa sistem bisikletliyi algılamayabilir.

questionTextSource: What must you note when using the active park assist?
explanationSource: After activating the active park assistant, the system supports you in finding and parking a suitable parking space. Nevertheless, you still have to observe the traffic and intervene manually when the dangers arise.
answerASource: - must be overridden if hazards exist
answerBSource: - means I no longer have to pay attention to other road traffic
answerCSource: - reliably detects all obstacles during the parking manoeuvre
questionTextTarget: Aktif park asistanı kullanırken neye dikkat etmelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Tehlike varsa sistemi geçersiz kılmalısınız. Sistem diğer trafiğe dikkat etme yükümlülüğünüzü ortadan kaldırmaz ve tüm engelleri güvenilir algılamaz.
answerBTarget: - artık diğer yol trafiğine dikkat etmem gerekmez
answerCTarget: - park manevrası sırasında tüm engelleri güvenilir şekilde algılar

questionTextSource: You are driving an electric vehicle. When can recuperation inhibit the braking action?
explanationSource: By recuperation, the engine of the electric vehicle works like a generator when braking. The braking therefore generates electricity and automatically loads the car battery. So if the battery of the electric vehicle is already fully charged, the vehicle cannot regain the energy and the braking effect through recuperation may not be available. Instead, the vehicle has to fall back on conventional brakes. The recuperation can also be reduced or deactivated if the battery is too cold. This can reduce the braking effect through recuperation.
answerASource: - with a fully charged battery
answerBSource: - at less than the battery’s operating temperature
answerCSource: - in eco mode
questionTextTarget: Elektrikli araç kullanıyorsunuz. Reküperasyon ne zaman frenleme etkisini sınırlayabilir?
explanationTarget: Batarya tamamen doluysa veya çalışma sıcaklığının altındaysa reküperasyon sınırlı olabilir. Eco modu tek başına frenlemeyi engellemez.

questionTextSource: Your vehicle is equipped with a hill-start assist. What benefit does this assist system provide?
explanationSource: The hill assist can make it easier for you to start off on a hill by releasing the brakes, thus preventing unintentional rolling back.
answerASource: - prevent my vehicle from rolling backwards unintentionally
answerBSource: - assume control of releasing the brakes
answerCSource: - drive all wheels simultaneously
questionTextTarget: Aracınız yokuş kalkış asistanıyla donatılmış. Bu sistemin faydası nedir?
explanationTarget: Yokuş kalkış asistanı aracın istemeden geriye kaymasını önlemeye yardımcı olur. Frenleri bırakma kontrolünü tamamen devralmaz ve tüm tekerlekleri aynı anda tahrik etmez.
answerCTarget: - tüm tekerlekleri aynı anda tahrik eder

questionTextSource: What applies when using driver assistance systems for longitudinal and lateral control of your vehicle?
explanationSource:
Before using the driver assistance system, you should understand the system's limitations. This way you know exactly which dangerous situations and malfunctions you need to pay more attention to. 
If you notice a driver assistance system malfunction, you should oversteer as quickly as possible. Through targeted oversteering, any errors in the driver assistance system during longitudinal and lateral guidance can be responded to manually. Oversteering can usually be triggered by gently pressing the accelerator and brake or by carefully counter-steering.
answerASource: I need to know the system limits of the driver assistance system
answerBSource: I must override the driver assistance system immediately in the event of a malfunction
answerCSource: When I am tired, I can let the driver assistance system take care of longitudinal and lateral control
questionTextTarget: Aracınızın boyuna ve enine kontrolü için sürücü destek sistemleri kullanırken ne geçerlidir?
explanationTarget: Sistem sınırlarını bilmeli ve arıza durumunda sistemi hemen geçersiz kılmalısınız. Yorgunken kontrolü sisteme bırakamazsınız.
answerATarget: Sürücü destek sisteminin sistem sınırlarını bilmeliyim
answerBTarget: Arıza durumunda sürücü destek sistemini hemen geçersiz kılmalıyım
answerCTarget: Yorgunsam boyuna ve enine kontrolü sürücü destek sistemine bırakabilirim

questionTextSource: What must you be prepared for when driving a partly loaded tank truck?
explanationSource: When a tank vehicle that you drive with partially loaded chambers, you need to adjust to increased risk of skidding and increased danger of tilting in curves.
answerASource: A great danger of tipping over when taking bends
answerBSource: A great danger of skidding
answerCSource: Heavy steering when driving down slopes
questionTextTarget: Kısmen dolu tanker kamyonu kullanırken neye hazırlıklı olmalısınız?

questionTextSource: How can you avoid excessive wear of the service brakes on a long downhill slope?

questionTextTarget: Uzun yokuş aşağı yolda servis frenlerinin aşırı aşınmasını nasıl önleyebilirsiniz?

answerBTarget: Diğer yolcuların güvenliğini tehlikeye atacak kişiler

questionTextTarget: Hangi yük taşımacılığı Karayolu Yük Taşımacılığı Kanunu kapsamı dışındadır?

questionTextSource: Your bus is equipped with a ramp operated by external power or lift operated by external power. What must you check regularly?

answerBSource: I have crossed over a traffic lane boundary line
answerCSource: I am driving too fast while performing a turn
questionTextTarget: Dönüş asistanınız neden uyarı verebilir?
explanationTarget: Aracınızın sağ yanında bir bisikletli bulunduğunda dönüş asistanı uyarı verebilir. Şerit çizgisini aşma veya çok hızlı dönme bu sistemin tipik uyarı sebebi değildir.
answerATarget: Aracımın sağ tarafında bir bisikletli bulunuyor

questionTextSource: Your motor vehicle is equipped with a turn assist system. What function does this perform during a turning manoeuvre?
explanationSource: A turn assistant checks the area to the right of the truck for bikers and walkers when turning right and warns the driver.
answerASource: - warns the driver of weaker road users on the passenger side
answerBSource: - warns the driver of obstructions on the passenger side
answerCSource: - can perform the complete turning manoeuvre
questionTextTarget: Motorlu aracınız dönüş asistanıyla donatılmış. Dönüş manevrası sırasında bu sistemin işlevi nedir?
explanationTarget: Sistem yolcu tarafındaki zayıf yol kullanıcıları ve engeller konusunda sürücüyü uyarabilir. Tüm dönüş manevrasını yapamaz.
answerATarget: - yolcu tarafındaki zayıf yol kullanıcıları konusunda sürücüyü uyarır
answerBTarget: - yolcu tarafındaki engeller konusunda sürücüyü uyarır

questionTextSource: What can you expect if you take a truck with a heavy load and drive it around a tight bend?
explanationSource: A heavily loaded truck can tip over when negotiating a tight curve, or inadequately secured cargo can slip because of centrifugal forces that are proportional to the mass of the vehicle and the cargo. These forces can destabilize the vehicle and cause it to tip over, especially if the center of gravity is high. Inadequately secured loads can slip due to these forces, further affecting the vehicle's balance and increasing the risk of accidents. Correct load securing is therefore essential to ensure the stability of the vehicle and increase road safety.
answerASource: The lorry can tip over if driven too fast
answerBSource: Insufficiently secured cargo can slip
answerCSource: The lorry handles better on bends
questionTextTarget: Ağır yüklü bir kamyonla dar virajdan geçerseniz ne bekleyebilirsiniz?
explanationTarget: Çok hızlı sürülürse kamyon devrilebilir ve yeterince güvenceye alınmamış yük kayabilir. Kamyon virajlarda daha iyi yol tutmaz.
answerCTarget: Kamyon virajlarda daha iyi yol tutar

questionTextSource: Which facilities on a trailer are not operational when the electrical connections to the towing vehicle are interrupted or the cables are not connected?
explanationSource: If the cables from the trailer are not operational because the electronic connection has been lost to the towing vehicle, the ABS is not working and lighting equipment will not work.
answerASource: The automatic anti-locking device (ABS)
answerBSource: All lighting facilities
answerCSource: The anti-slip device (ASR)
questionTextTarget: Çekici araçla elektrik bağlantısı kesilmişse veya kablolar bağlı değilse römorktaki hangi sistemler çalışmaz?
explanationTarget: Elektrik bağlantısı yoksa römorkun ABS sistemi ve tüm aydınlatma tertibatları çalışmaz. ASR bu cevapta ilgili değildir.

questionTextSource: What should you regularly check with a spare tyre carried in the vehicle?
explanationSource: When carried spare you should pay attention to the secure attachment and check the air pressure. Profile name is incorrect.
answerASource: That it is securely in place
answerBSource: The tyre pressure
answerCSource: The profile designation
questionTextTarget: Araçta taşınan yedek lastikte neyi düzenli kontrol etmelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Yedek lastiğin güvenli şekilde sabitlendiğini ve lastik basıncını düzenli kontrol etmelisiniz. Profil adı belirleyici değildir.

questionTextSource: You are driving a loaded truck on a road with gradients. Despite engaging the permanent brake, the speed increases markedly. What is the right course of action?
explanationSource: You should try to increase the engine braking effect of your truck for a downgrade by looking brakes on with the service brake to be able to switch back.
answerASource: Continue braking using the service brake to allow you to change down gears
answerBSource: Disengage the permanent brake and maintain speed using the service brake only
answerCSource: Continue braking using the service brake to allow you to change up gears
questionTextTarget: Yüklü kamyonla eğimli yolda gidiyorsunuz. Sürekli fren devrede olmasına rağmen hız belirgin artıyor. Doğru davranış nedir?
explanationTarget: Vites küçültebilmek için servis freniyle frenlemeye devam etmelisiniz. Sürekli freni bırakıp yalnızca servis freniyle gitmek veya vites büyütmek doğru değildir.
answerATarget: Vites küçültebilmek için servis freniyle frenlemeye devam etmek
answerBTarget: Sürekli freni devreden çıkarıp hızı yalnızca servis freniyle korumak
answerCTarget: Vites büyütebilmek için servis freniyle frenlemeye devam etmek

questionTextSource: What should be noted with a motorbike with a conventional anti-lock braking system (ABS) when braking in a bend?
explanationSource: Even if your motorcycle has ABS, you should still use controlled braking as ABS is mostly made for strong braking in straight lines. In a bend, the stronger you break, the more torque you will feel which will tend to put your motorcycle from a tilted to a straight position.
answerASource: You should nevertheless perform controlled braking when in a declined position
answerBSource: The self-righting torque is dependent on the braking force
answerCSource: The transmissible braking forces increase in the declined position
questionTextTarget: Klasik ABS’li motosikletle virajda fren yaparken neye dikkat edilmelidir?
explanationTarget: Yatık pozisyonda bile kontrollü frenleme yapmalısınız. Doğrulma momenti fren kuvvetine bağlıdır. Yatık pozisyonda aktarılabilir fren kuvvetleri artmaz.
answerATarget: Yatık pozisyonda yine de kontrollü frenleme yapılmalıdır
answerCTarget: Yatık pozisyonda aktarılabilir fren kuvvetleri artar

questionTextSource: What can help the wobbling of a motorbike?
explanationSource: Wobbling increases at higher speed and if the weight is not well distributed such as more weight on the right or left side
answerASource: Driving at a higher speed
answerBSource: One-sided weight loading
answerCSource: Driving at a slower speed
questionTextTarget: Motosikletin yalpalamasına ne yardımcı olabilir?
explanationTarget: Daha düşük hızda sürmek yalpalamayı azaltabilir. Daha yüksek hız veya tek taraflı yükleme yalpalamayı artırabilir.

questionTextSource: What can cause a motorbike to start wobbling?
explanationSource: Wobbling can be due to unbalanced weights (more weight to the right or left side) or wrongly fitted fairings that cause more drag to one or the other side
answerASource: Wrongly fitted fairings
answerBSource: Unbalanced loading of side panniers
answerCSource: Poor fuel quality
questionTextTarget: Motosikletin yalpalamaya başlamasına ne neden olabilir?
explanationTarget: Yanlış takılmış kaplamalar ve yan çantaların dengesiz yüklenmesi yalpalamaya neden olabilir. Yakıt kalitesi tipik neden değildir.

questionTextSource: What is the effect of the cornering characteristics of a combination vehicle (motor vehicle towing a trailer) when taking a turn?
explanationSource: The cornering characteristics of a vehicle combination can swing when turning and you can cut the corner.
answerASource: - can jut out
answerBSource: - can cut the corner
answerCSource: - generally follows the track of the towing vehicle
questionTextTarget: Römork çeken motorlu araç kombinasyonunun dönüş davranışı dönüş sırasında nasıl etkiler?
explanationTarget: Kombinasyon dışarı taşabilir ve virajı içten kesebilir. Genel olarak çekici aracın izini tam takip etmez.
answerCTarget: - genellikle çekici aracın izini takip eder

questionTextSource: You notice there is play on the handlebar bearing. What must you do?
explanationSource: Having a loose handlebar with some play is dangerous and make your motorcycle more difficult to control, make sure to not have any play to guarantee your safety
answerASource: Have the play eliminated
answerBSource: Leave the play because it is easier to move the handlebar
questionTextTarget: Gidon yatağında boşluk fark ettiniz. Ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Gidon yatağındaki boşluk giderilmelidir. Boşluk bırakılırsa sürüş davranışı bozulabilir.
answerBTarget: Gidonu daha kolay hareket ettirdiği için boşluğu bırakmak

questionTextSource: When you move the handlebar, you notice that the handlebar bearing is catching in one place. What must you do?
explanationSource: Having catching in your handelbar bearing makes your motorcycle more difficult to control, make sure to not have any to garantee your safety
answerASource: Have the catching eliminated
answerBSource: Increase the play of the handlebar bearing to improve track-holding
questionTextTarget: Gidonu hareket ettirdiğinizde gidon yatağının bir noktada takıldığını fark ediyorsunuz. Ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Takılma giderilmelidir. İz tutuşu iyileştirmek için boşluk artırılmaz.
answerBTarget: İz tutuşunu iyileştirmek için gidon yatağı boşluğunu artırmak

questionTextSource: What can play in the handlebar bearing cause?
explanationSource: Having a loose handlebar with some play is dangerous and make your motorcycle more difficult to control, make sure to not have any play to garantee your safety
answerASource: It can have a negative influence on road behaviour
answerBSource: Road behaviour is improved
answerCSource: Track-holding is improved
questionTextTarget: Gidon yatağındaki boşluk neye neden olabilir?
explanationTarget: Gidon yatağındaki boşluk sürüş davranışını olumsuz etkileyebilir. Sürüş davranışını veya iz tutuşunu iyileştirmez.

questionTextSource: What effect can a defective steering shock absorber have on road behaviour?
explanationSource: A defective steering shock absorber can cause the steering wheel to vibrate/shimmy and decrease the stability and roadworthiness of your motorcycle
answerASource: A defective steering shock absorber can cause the steering wheel to shimmy
answerBSource: Roadworthiness can deteriorate
answerCSource: Roadworthiness only deteriorates at low speed
questionTextTarget: Arızalı direksiyon amortisörü sürüş davranışını nasıl etkileyebilir?
explanationTarget: Arızalı direksiyon amortisörü direksiyonun titremesine neden olabilir ve yol güvenliğini kötüleştirebilir. Etki sadece düşük hızlarda olmaz.
answerATarget: Arızalı direksiyon amortisörü direksiyonun titremesine neden olabilir
answerCTarget: Yol güvenliği sadece düşük hızda kötüleşir

questionTextSource: What can decisively impair road behaviour?
explanationSource: All three will worsen the steering of your motorcycle making it more difficult to control and drive safely
answerASource: Deflected handlebar bearing
answerBSource: Defective steering shock absorber
answerCSource: Play in the handlebar bearing
questionTextTarget: Sürüş davranışını belirgin şekilde ne bozabilir?
explanationTarget: Eğilmiş gidon yatağı, arızalı direksiyon amortisörü ve gidon yatağındaki boşluk sürüş davranışını belirgin şekilde bozabilir.

questionTextSource: You notice your motorcycle has poor track-holding. What can be the cause?
explanationSource: Both play in the wheel bearings and deflected back fork can cause your motorcycle to not keep its course and make handling more difficult and less safe
answerASource: Too much play in the wheel bearings
answerBSource: Deflected backfork
questionTextTarget: Motosikletinizin iz tutuşunun kötü olduğunu fark ediyorsunuz. Bunun nedeni ne olabilir?
explanationTarget: Tekerlek yataklarında fazla boşluk veya eğilmiş arka maşa kötü iz tutuşuna neden olabilir.

questionTextSource: Your motorcycle no longer keeps the track. What can be defective?
explanationSource: A bent fork or frame can make your motorcycle not aligned which will result in difficulty to keep your course
answerASource: Bent fork
answerBSource: Bent frame
answerCSource: Defective rear wheel brake
questionTextTarget: Motosikletiniz artık izini korumuyor. Ne arızalı olabilir?
explanationTarget: Eğilmiş çatal veya eğilmiş şasi motosikletin iz tutuşunu bozabilir. Arızalı arka fren tipik neden değildir.

questionTextSource: When you throttle down without disengaging the clutch, your motorcycle no longer keeps to the track. What can be the cause of this?
explanationSource: Both play in the rear wheel bearing and fork bearing can cause your motorcycle to not keep its course and make handling more difficult and less safe
answerASource: Too much play of the fork bearing
answerBSource: Too much play of the rear-wheel bearing
answerCSource: Idle speed too high
questionTextTarget: Debriyajı ayırmadan gazı kestiğinizde motosikletiniz artık izini korumuyor. Bunun nedeni ne olabilir?
explanationTarget: Çatal yatağında veya arka tekerlek yatağında çok fazla boşluk buna neden olabilir. Rölanti devrinin yüksek olması tipik neden değildir.
answerBTarget: Arka tekerlek yatağında çok fazla boşluk

questionTextSource: You notice that the lever travel of the hydraulic front wheel brake on your motorcycle has become considerably longer. What must you do?
explanationSource: It is a sign of a defective front wheel brake which needs to be repaired or replaced
answerASource: Have the front wheel brake repaired
answerBSource: Only use the rear wheel brake until the next service
answerCSource: Fill up the brake fluid immediately
questionTextTarget: Motosikletinizin hidrolik ön freninde kol hareketinin belirgin şekilde uzadığını fark ediyorsunuz. Ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Ön fren derhal tamir ettirilmelidir. Sadece arka freni kullanarak devam etmek veya hemen fren hidroliği eklemek güvenli çözüm değildir.
answerBTarget: Bir sonraki servise kadar sadece arka freni kullanmak

questionTextSource: The mirror holder on your motorcycle is loose. What do you do?
explanationSource: You should never remove your mirror and need to fix them as they are required at all time to see the traffic behind you
answerASource: Fix the mirror holder
answerBSource: Remove the mirror
questionTextTarget: Motosikletinizin ayna tutucusu gevşek. Ne yaparsınız?
explanationTarget: Ayna tutucusunu sabitlemelisiniz. Aynayı sökmek doğru değildir.

questionTextSource: What can you check on your tyre?
explanationSource: The driver can check on the tire whether the prescribed tread depth is present and whether the tread has a consistent wear. In addition, the age of the tire can be read off the so-called DOT number.
answerASource: Uniform wear of the profile
answerBSource: Profile
answerCSource: The age of the tyre
questionTextTarget: Lastiğinizde neyi kontrol edebilirsiniz?
explanationTarget: Lastik profilinin eşit aşınmasını, profil derinliğini ve lastiğin yaşını kontrol edebilirsiniz.

questionTextSource: When do you need to renew the brake pads?
explanationSource: The car driver must replace the brake pads on the vehicle if they are heavily contaminated by oil. Replacement is also necessary and mandatory when reaching the wear limit.
answerASource: If they have become oiled
answerBSource: If they have reached the wear limit
answerCSource: If they have got wet
questionTextTarget: Fren balatalarını ne zaman yenilemeniz gerekir?
explanationTarget: Fren balataları yağlanmışsa veya aşınma sınırına ulaşmışsa yenilenmelidir. Islanmaları tek başına yenileme sebebi değildir.

questionTextSource: Just after driving off, you test the brakes. Why?
explanationSource: Immediately after the start of the journey you should check the effectiveness of the service brake with a brake test for your own safety. Unlike bleeding the brake system, you can do this yourself by pressing the brake comfortably.
answerASource: To check the effectiveness of the brakes
answerBSource: To bleed the brake system quickly
questionTextTarget: Hareket ettikten hemen sonra frenleri test ediyorsunuz. Neden?
explanationTarget: Frenlerin etkinliğini kontrol etmek için. Fren sisteminin havasını hızlıca almak için yapılmaz.
answerBTarget: Fren sisteminin havasını hızlıca almak için

questionTextSource: Why does the brake fluid have to be exchanged according to the instructions of the vehicle manufacturer?
explanationSource: The brake fluid also draws water from the air, so the proportion of water in the brake fluid increases over time. Too much water will cause bubbles in the brake fluid. If air bubbles get into the brake line, the braking action can completely fail.
answerASource: To ensure the brake system continues to function even under higher stress
answerBSource: To ensure the percentage of water in the brake fluid does not reach a level which is unacceptable
answerCSource: To ensure the brake system does not leak
questionTextTarget: Fren hidroliği neden araç üreticisinin talimatlarına göre değiştirilmelidir?
explanationTarget: Fren sisteminin yüksek yük altında da çalışmasını sağlamak ve fren hidroliğindeki su oranının kabul edilemez seviyeye çıkmasını önlemek için değiştirilir.
answerATarget: Fren sisteminin daha yüksek yük altında da çalışmaya devam etmesini sağlamak için
answerBTarget: Fren hidroliğindeki su oranının kabul edilemez seviyeye ulaşmamasını sağlamak için
answerCTarget: Fren sisteminin sızdırmaz olmasını sağlamak için

questionTextSource: In which cases is it imperative to test the brakes?
explanationSource: A brake test is always essential if a vehicle has not been moved for a long period of time or if you are taking over a vehicle from someone else. If an oil change has been made on a vehicle, this has no effect on the brake system.
answerASource: When you drive a different vehicle
answerBSource: If a vehicle has not been used for a longer period
answerCSource: Each time the engine oil is changed
questionTextTarget: Hangi durumlarda frenleri mutlaka test etmelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Başka bir araç kullanırken veya araç uzun süre kullanılmamışsa frenler test edilmelidir. Her motor yağı değişiminde şart değildir.

questionTextSource: What do you have to check the tyres on your vehicle at regular intervals for?
explanationSource: At regular intervals you should check the air pressure and tread depth of your vehicle tires. In addition, you should regularly check the tires on your vehicle for external damage.
answerASource: For correct air pressure
answerBSource: For sufficient profile
answerCSource: For external damage
questionTextTarget: Aracınızın lastiklerini düzenli olarak ne açısından kontrol etmelisiniz?
explanationTarget: Doğru hava basıncı, yeterli profil ve dış hasarlar düzenli kontrol edilmelidir.

questionTextSource: If tyre pressure is too high or too low, what can this cause?
explanationSource: If the internal tire pressure is too high or too low, the driving behavior will deteriorate. In addition, the tire wear increases. If the tire pressure is too low, the tire heats up by flexing, while the "soft" tire is excessively compressed and relieved at the footprint. The consequences are an increased fuel consumption and a high rolling resistance, in addition, the driving stability decreases. If the tire pressure is too high, the tire may burst. It is important to check the tire pressure regularly and to take the information recommended by the manufacturer into account. The tire pressure has no influence on the thinking distance.
answerASource: Road behaviour can deteriorate
answerBSource: Tyre wear can increase
answerCSource: Reaction distance can be longer
questionTextTarget: Lastik basıncı çok yüksek veya çok düşükse neye neden olabilir?
explanationTarget: Sürüş davranışı kötüleşebilir ve lastik aşınması artabilir. Tepki mesafesi lastik basıncından doğrudan uzamaz.

questionTextSource: You hit a tyre against a hard obstacle with force. What must you do?
explanationSource: Tire and wheel rim must be thoroughly checked before proceeding. Damage to the tire flanks is particularly critical. A deformed wheel rim can cause the tire to slip off the rim. A torn alloy wheel can also have dire consequences. The wheel bolts are not subjected to extraordinary strain, so they do not need to be tightened.
answerASource: Have the tyres and rim checked immediately
answerBSource: Retighten the wheel bolts
questionTextTarget: Lastiği sert bir engele kuvvetli şekilde çarptınız. Ne yapmalısınız?
explanationTarget: Lastikleri ve jantı hemen kontrol ettirmelisiniz. Sadece bijonları sıkmak yeterli değildir.
answerATarget: Lastikleri ve jantı hemen kontrol ettirmek

questionTextSource: What happens when you drive with a tyre pressure which is far too low?
explanationSource: If you drive with significantly too low tire pressure, the tire may overheat. The low air pressure decreases the driving stability, the vehicle "floats" on the road. A reduction in tire footprint due to concavity in the tread center increases tire wear. Too little tire pressure also increases fuel consumption.
answerASource: Tyres heat up excessively
answerBSource: Driving stability decreases
answerCSource: Tyre wear decreases
questionTextTarget: Çok düşük lastik basıncıyla sürerseniz ne olur?
explanationTarget: Lastikler aşırı ısınır ve sürüş dengesi azalır. Lastik aşınması azalmaz, artar.

questionTextSource: What can be the cause of a rear light not to work?
explanationSource: If the taillight fails, you should first check the bulb. Even a defective fuse can cause a failure. The starter, however, does not matter because it is not related to the lighting system.
answerASource: Bulb is defective
answerBSource: Fuse has blown
answerCSource: Starter is defective
questionTextTarget: Arka lambanın çalışmamasının nedeni ne olabilir?
explanationTarget: Ampul arızalı olabilir veya sigorta atmış olabilir. Marş motoru arızası arka lambayı tipik olarak etkilemez.

questionTextSource: The control light of your indicator is blinking considerably faster than usual. What can be the cause of this?
explanationSource: The flashing interval of the control lamp is shortened significantly if a bulb of the turn signal is defective. A fault with the flashing light switch cannot be the cause of the faster flashing.
answerASource: A bulb is defective
answerBSource: The direction indicator switch is defective
questionTextTarget: Sinyal kontrol lambası normalden belirgin şekilde hızlı yanıp sönüyor. Bunun nedeni ne olabilir?
explanationTarget: Bir ampul arızalı olabilir. Sinyal kolunun arızalı olması da mümkün olabilir, ancak hızlı yanıp sönmenin tipik sebebi ampul arızasıdır.

questionTextSource: Why are you required to have a defective exhaust system repaired immediately?
explanationSource: You must repair a rusted exhaust system immediately, otherwise parts of the exhaust may fall onto the road. This poses a danger to the other road users. In addition, rusty exhaust parts create unnecessary noise. A rusted exhaust system has no effect on the temperature of the engine.
answerASource: Because of the noise pollution
answerBSource: Because parts of the exhaust system can drop on the roadway
answerCSource: Because the engine would overheat
questionTextTarget: Arızalı egzoz sistemini neden hemen tamir ettirmeniz gerekir?
explanationTarget: Gürültü kirliliği nedeniyle ve egzoz parçaları yola düşebileceği için tamir ettirilmelidir. Motorun aşırı ısınması asıl sebep değildir.
answerBTarget: Egzoz sistemi parçaları yola düşebileceği için
